query:
UPDATE clients 
SET deletedAt = NOW()
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
AND (
  name LIKE 'Cliente Test%'
  OR name LIKE 'Test Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Manual Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Manual Mix Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Manual Quotation Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'DataOrigin Test Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'System Test Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Test Manual Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Test User%'
  OR name LIKE 'Cliente Duplicado%'
  OR name LIKE 'Cliente Timezone Test%'
  OR name LIKE 'New Name Only%'
  OR name = 'Manuel Nope'
);
command:

  OR name LIKE 'Manual Client%'
  OR name LIKE 'Manual Mix Client%'
